creator: adrian@freebsd.org
text:
On 27 May 2011 21:25, Dalibor Gudzic <dalibor.gudzic@gmail.com> wrote:

> Ah, I haven't been using FreeBSD for some time now... I see things
> have changed in 7.x. :) Card is WORKING properly now. I tried setting
> and address and listening on it. I will test further today and see if
> there are any problems.
> Anyway, is there a chance for a patch downstream to STABLE? Or change
> is already there?
>
> Again, thank a lot for your time and effort on this issue.

Hi! I don't even know what the underlying bus issue in earlier
versions. I just know that there's been some bugfixes with the bus
resource allocation code. I don't even know what to port over. :)

I'm just glad it works. :)


Adrian
